Container.Name: gpxplore-enrichment
Container.Overview: NUC-side whole-route surface enrichment for gpxplore. Chunks GPX points, calls Valhalla trace_attributes, joins the co-versioned surface sidecar, and returns the normalized surface composite. Keep behind Cloudflare Tunnel + Access.
Container.Requires: Valhalla on the same Docker network; a completed build containing surface_provenance.sqlite and tile_manifest.json.

Config.Name: Tiles + sidecar (/data)
Config.Description: The same active build mounted by Valhalla. The helper reads tile_manifest.json and surface_provenance.sqlite; keep this mount read-only.

Config.Name: Valhalla origin
Config.Description: Internal Valhalla base URL. The hostname works when both containers share a user-defined Docker network; otherwise use the NUC LAN URL.
